name: odoo-mcp-connector
description: Connects Claude to the Vision Lighting live Odoo instance — read everything, plus restricted writes (products, variants, images, pricelists, project tasks, helpdesk tickets, contacts) and PDFMonkey datasheet generation.

live_url.title: Odoo URL
live_url.description: Base URL of the live instance, e.g. https://your-company.odoo.com

live_db.title: Database name
live_db.description: Live database name (ask your Odoo admin if unsure).

live_api_key.title: Odoo API key
live_api_key.description: API key from the live instance (Settings > My Profile > Account Security > API Keys).

pdfmonkey_api_key.title: PDFMonkey API key (optional)
pdfmonkey_api_key.description: Only needed for datasheet generation. Leave blank otherwise.

pdfmonkey_template_id.title: PDFMonkey template ID (optional)
pdfmonkey_template_id.description: The PDFMonkey datasheet template ID. Only needed for datasheet generation.
